name: BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Connection to Host Categorized as Cryptocurrency Mining
notes: This Building Block triggers when an internal system communicates with an IP that is considered to be hosting Cryptocurrency Mining. It could be an indicator of a Cryptocurrency Mining malware infection. The default confidence (75) indicates a strong possibility that this is a Cryptocurrency Mining host.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP
BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Connection to Host Categorized as Cryptocurrency Mining on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP
when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Cryptocurrency Mining with confidence value greater than 75
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Connection to Host Categorized as Cryptocurrency Mining on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND NOT when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining IP
AND when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Cryptocurrency Mining with confidence value greater than 75
